index.description: Deterministic alias index to look up.

account_id.description: Account identifier bound to the alias.

source.description: Backend source for the alias mapping.

account_id.description: Account identifier bound to the alias.

source.description: Backend source for the alias mapping.

leaf.description: Execution result hash encoded as lowercase hexadecimal.

audit_path.description: Sibling nodes from leaf to root; null denotes an absent sibling for balanced padding.

items.description: Sibling hash encoded as lowercase hexadecimal.

leaf_index.description: Zero-based position of the leaf within the Merkle tree.

block_height.description: Height of the block containing the entrypoint.

entry_hash.description: Transaction entrypoint hash encoded as lowercase hexadecimal.

entry_root.description: Merkle root that authenticates the entrypoint proof (consensus root for external transactions, extended root after time-trigger execution otherwise).

result_proof.description: Execution result proof when the block carries execution results; null otherwise.

result_root.description: Merkle root that authenticates the execution proof when results are available; null when the block contains no execution results.

leaf.description: Transaction entrypoint hash encoded as lowercase hexadecimal.

call_name.description: Call name within the domain namespace.

domain_id.description: Domain that owns the Kaigi call.

hpke_public_key_b64.description: Base64-encoded HPKE public key advertised by the relay.

metrics.description: Aggregated counters for the relay's owning domain.

notes.description: Free-form notes accompanying the latest health report.

reported_by.description: Account identifier that submitted the latest health report.

reported_call.description: Kaigi call associated with the latest health report, when available.

domain.description: Domain label for the aggregated counters.

failovers_total.description: Total relay failovers observed for the domain.

health_reports_total.description: Total relay health reports recorded for the domain.

manifest_updates_total.description: Total relay manifest updates observed for the domain.

registrations_total.description: Total relay registrations observed for the domain.

degraded_total.description: Number of relays currently reported degraded.

healthy_total.description: Number of relays currently reported healthy.

unavailable_total.description: Number of relays currently reported unavailable.

bandwidth_class.description: Advertised bandwidth class (relative scale; larger values indicate higher capacity).

hpke_fingerprint_hex.description: Hex-encoded BLAKE3 fingerprint of the relay's HPKE public key.

reported_at_ms.description: Milliseconds since UNIX epoch of the latest health report.

total.description: Total number of relay entries returned.

asset_id.description: Asset id bound to the allowance.

attestation_nonce_hex.description: Nonce bound to the cached verdict rendered as hex.

certificate_id_hex.description: Deterministic certificate hash rendered as lowercase hex.

controller_display.description: Controller rendered according to the address_format hint.

deadline_kind.description: Deadline currently tracked for countdown warnings (`refresh`, `policy`, or `certificate`).

deadline_ms.description: Unix millisecond timestamp for the selected deadline.

deadline_ms_remaining.description: Signed milliseconds remaining until the deadline (negative when already expired).

policy_expires_at_ms.description: Policy expiry timestamp (ms) enforced by the issuer.

refresh_at_ms.description: Next attestation refresh deadline (ms), if provided.

registered_at_ms.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when the allowance was registered.

remaining_amount.description: Outstanding allowance amount that has not been reconciled.

verdict_id_hex.description: Cached attestation verdict identifier rendered as hex.

total.description: Total number of allowances matching the filter.

attestation_jws_b64.description: Base64-encoded JWS payload captured at settlement.

OfflineQueryEnvelope.description: Superset of Torii's Norito QueryEnvelope structure.

address_format.description: Optional rendering preference for account ids (`ih58` or `compressed`).

filter.description: Filter expression object expressed in the Torii filter DSL.

query.description: Optional label for the query payload.

count.description: Number of occurrences recorded for this platform/reason pair.

total.description: Sum of all rejection counters returned in the payload.

certificate_id_hex.description: Deterministic certificate hash rendered as lowercase hex.

controller_display.description: Controller rendered according to the address_format hint.

controller_id.description: Controller account id bound to the certificate.

summary_hash_hex.description: BLAKE2b-256 hash of the counter maps rendered as hex.

total.description: Total number of summaries matching the filter.

archived_at_height.description: Optional block height when the bundle was archived.

asset_id.description: Asset id inferred from receipts, if present.

attestation_nonce_hex.description: Cached attestation nonce captured at settlement.

bundle_id_hex.description: Bundle identifier rendered as lowercase hex.

certificate_expires_at_ms.description: Certificate expiry timestamp captured at settlement.

claimed_delta.description: Claimed delta reported by the balance proof.

controller_display.description: Controller rendered with the requested address format.

controller_id.description: Controller account id associated with the originating allowance.

deposit_account_display.description: Deposit account rendered with requested address format.

deposit_account_id.description: Online account that will receive the deposit.

platform_token_snapshot.description: Snapshot of the attestation token recorded during settlement.

policy_expires_at_ms.description: Policy expiry timestamp captured at settlement.

receipt_count.description: Number of receipts included in the bundle.

receiver_display.description: Receiver rendered with requested address format.

recorded_at_height.description: Block height that recorded the bundle.

recorded_at_ms.description: Unix timestamp (ms) when the bundle settled on-ledger.

refresh_at_ms.description: Attestation refresh deadline captured at settlement.

status.description: Lifecycle status enforced for the bundle.

status_transitions.description: Ordered lifecycle history for the bundle.

total_amount.description: Human-readable total amount aggregated from receipts.

transfer.description: Full OfflineToOnlineTransfer payload serialized as JSON.

verdict_snapshot.description: Snapshot of certificate/verdict metadata captured at settlement.

total.description: Total number of transfer bundles matching the filter.

status.description: Status that became active during this transition.

verdict_snapshot.description: Optional verdict metadata snapshot captured at this transition.

certificate_expires_at_ms.description: Certificate expiry timestamp captured at settlement.

certificate_id.description: Deterministic certificate identifier backing the bundle (`hash:...` literal).

policy_expires_at_ms.description: Policy expiry timestamp captured at settlement.

refresh_at_ms.description: Timestamp when the attestation must be refreshed.

lane_id.description: Lane identifier echoed from the request.

bonded.description: Bonded amount for the validator/staker pair.

lane_id.description: Lane serviced by the stake entry.

metadata.description: Optional metadata captured alongside the stake share.

pending_unbonds.description: Pending unbonding requests for the stake.

staker.description: Staker account literal rendered per address_format.

validator.description: Validator account literal rendered per address_format.

lane_id.description: Lane identifier echoed from the request.

last_reward_epoch.description: Epoch that last produced a reward payout.

metadata.description: Optional metadata (commission, endpoints, jurisdiction flags, etc.).

total_stake.description: Total bonded stake for the validator.

validator.description: Validator account literal rendered per address_format.

haircut_bps.description: Haircut applied to the collateral leg in basis points.

margin_frequency_secs.description: Cadence between required margin checks in seconds.

asset_definition_id.description: Asset definition identifier associated with the leg.

metadata.description: Arbitrary Norito metadata captured alongside the leg.

quantity.description: Decimal representation of the leg quantity.

confidence_ms.description: Confidence interval (±ms) reported by the network time service.

now.description: Network time in milliseconds since the UNIX epoch.

offset_ms.description: Estimated offset from the local clock in milliseconds.

count.description: Number of samples observed in the bucket.

le.description: Upper bound of the RTT bucket in milliseconds.

note.description: Human-readable status note from the network time service.

peers.description: Number of peers reporting time samples.

count.description: Total number of RTT samples captured.

sum_ms.description: Cumulative RTT sample sum in milliseconds.

count.description: Number of samples collected from the peer.

last_offset_ms.description: Most recent offset measurement in milliseconds.

last_rtt_ms.description: Most recent round-trip time measurement in milliseconds.

info.description: HTTP surface for Torii (pending full endpoint coverage).
info.title: Iroha Torii API

get.description: Returns `Healthy` when the node is accepting HTTP requests.

post.description: Returns the canonical alias spelling, the bound account identifier, and (if known) the deterministic alias index.
post.summary: Resolve an alias string into an account and index.

post.description: Returns the alias string and account identifier registered under the provided index.
post.summary: Resolve an alias entry by deterministic index.

post.description: Takes a blinded alias element (hex) and returns the deterministically evaluated mock response used by tooling.
post.summary: Evaluate the mock alias VOPRF helper.

get.description: Returns relay identifiers, domains, bandwidth classes, HPKE fingerprints, and the freshest health report (if available).

503.description: Telemetry profile does not permit relay telemetry.

get.summary: List registered Kaigi relays with their latest health sample.

get.description: Streams relay registration and health events as Server-Sent Events. Optional query parameters filter by domain, relay, or event kind.

parameters.description: Optional domain filter (case-insensitive).
parameters.name: domain

parameters.description: Optional relay identifier filter.
parameters.name: relay

parameters.description: Optional comma-separated list of event kinds (`registration`, `health`).
parameters.name: kind

503.description: Telemetry profile does not permit relay telemetry.

get.summary: Subscribe to Kaigi relay telemetry events (SSE).

get.description: Returns totals for healthy/degraded/unavailable relays along with registrations, failovers, and per-domain counters.

503.description: Telemetry profile does not permit relay telemetry.

get.summary: Aggregate Kaigi relay health counters across the network.

get.description: Returns relay registration metadata, base64 HPKE key material, latest health report context, and aggregated per-domain counters.

parameters.description: Relay account identifier (e.g., `relay@kaigi`).
parameters.name: relay_id

503.description: Telemetry profile does not permit relay telemetry.

get.summary: Fetch metadata and metrics for a specific Kaigi relay.

get.description: Returns the inclusion and execution Merkle proofs for the specified transaction entrypoint within a block.

parameters.description: Block height to inspect (1-indexed).
parameters.name: height

parameters.description: Transaction entrypoint hash encoded as lowercase hexadecimal.
parameters.name: entry_hash

200.description: Merkle proofs for the requested entrypoint.

400.description: Invalid block height or entry hash supplied.

get.summary: Fetch Merkle proofs for a block entrypoint.

get.description: Returns bonded stake per validator/staker pair for the requested public lane. Supports an optional validator filter and renders account literals according to the `address_format` hint (`ih58` or `compressed`).

parameters.description: Nexus public lane identifier.
parameters.name: lane_id

parameters.description: Preferred address format (`ih58` or `compressed`).
parameters.name: address_format

parameters.description: Optional validator account literal to filter stake entries (IH58/compressed).
parameters.name: validator

400.description: Invalid lane id or validator filter.

get.summary: List bonded stake shares for a public lane.

get.description: Returns validators servicing the requested public lane with stake metadata and lifecycle status. Account literals honour the optional `address_format` hint (`ih58` or `compressed`).

parameters.description: Nexus public lane identifier.
parameters.name: lane_id

parameters.description: Preferred address format (`ih58` or `compressed`).
parameters.name: address_format

get.summary: List validators registered for a public lane.

get.description: Returns operator-issued offline wallet certificates plus ledger-maintained counter checkpoints. Supports optional filter, pagination, and sort parameters encoded as query arguments.

parameters.description: Optional Norito JSON filter expression encoded as a compact string (see Torii filter DSL).
parameters.name: filter

parameters.description: Optional page size limit.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Optional starting offset (default 0).
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Optional CSV sort spec, e.g., `registered_at_ms:desc`.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Optional rendering for account ids (`ih58` or `compressed`).
parameters.name: address_format

parameters.description: Filter allowances by controller account (accepts IH58/compressed/public-key literals).
parameters.name: controller_id

parameters.description: Only include allowances whose certificate expiry is at or before this unix timestamp (ms).
parameters.name: certificate_expires_before_ms

parameters.description: Only include allowances whose certificate expiry is at or after this unix timestamp (ms).
parameters.name: certificate_expires_after_ms

parameters.description: Only include allowances whose issuer policy expiry is at or before this unix timestamp (ms).
parameters.name: policy_expires_before_ms

parameters.description: Only include allowances whose issuer policy expiry is at or after this unix timestamp (ms).
parameters.name: policy_expires_after_ms

parameters.description: Filter to allowances whose attestation refresh deadline is at or before this unix timestamp (ms).
parameters.name: refresh_before_ms

parameters.description: Filter to allowances whose attestation refresh deadline is at or after this unix timestamp (ms).
parameters.name: refresh_after_ms

parameters.description: Match allowances whose cached attestation verdict id (hex) equals the provided value (case-insensitive).
parameters.name: verdict_id_hex

parameters.description: Match allowances whose attestation nonce (hex) equals the provided value (case-insensitive).
parameters.name: attestation_nonce_hex

parameters.description: When true, only allowances that already have attestation verdict metadata are returned.
parameters.name: require_verdict

parameters.description: When true, only allowances that are missing attestation verdict metadata are returned.
parameters.name: only_missing_verdict

parameters.description: Include certificates/policies/refresh windows that have already expired (defaults to false).
parameters.name: include_expired

post.description: Accepts the Norito `QueryEnvelope` structure so clients can submit complex filters, selectors, and pagination hints when listing allowances.
post.summary: Query offline allowances with a JSON envelope.

get.description: Returns aggregated counts grouped by platform and rejection reason so operators can monitor App Attest and KeyMint validation failures.
Returns controller-facing summaries of the latest App Attest and Android marker counters observed for each allowance certificate.

parameters.description: Optional Norito JSON filter expression encoded as a compact string (see Torii filter DSL).
parameters.name: filter

parameters.description: Optional page size limit.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Optional starting offset (default 0).
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Optional CSV sort spec, e.g., `registered_at_ms:desc`.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Optional rendering for account ids (`ih58` or `compressed`).
parameters.name: address_format

get.summary: List hardware counter summaries for offline allowances.

post.description: Accepts the Norito `QueryEnvelope` structure so operators can fetch counter checkpoints with complex filters, selectors, and pagination hints.
post.summary: Query offline counter summaries with a JSON envelope.

get.description: Returns bundles with their receiver/deposit accounts, receipts, and balance proofs for audit or settlement dashboards.

parameters.description: Optional Norito JSON filter expression encoded as a compact string (see Torii filter DSL).
parameters.name: filter

parameters.description: Optional page size limit.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Optional starting offset (default 0).
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Optional CSV sort spec, e.g., `registered_at_ms:desc`.
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: Optional rendering for account ids (`ih58` or `compressed`).
parameters.name: address_format

parameters.description: Filter bundles by originating controller account (accepts IH58/compressed/public-key literals).
parameters.name: controller_id

parameters.description: Filter bundles by receiver account (accepts IH58/compressed/public-key literals).
parameters.name: receiver_id

parameters.description: Filter bundles by deposit account (accepts IH58/compressed/public-key literals).
parameters.name: deposit_account_id

parameters.description: Match bundles whose originating certificate id (hex) equals the provided value (case-insensitive).
parameters.name: certificate_id_hex

parameters.description: Only include bundles whose originating certificate expiry is at or before this unix timestamp (ms).
parameters.name: certificate_expires_before_ms

parameters.description: Only include bundles whose originating certificate expiry is at or after this unix timestamp (ms).
parameters.name: certificate_expires_after_ms

parameters.description: Only include bundles whose policy expiry is at or before this unix timestamp (ms).
parameters.name: policy_expires_before_ms

parameters.description: Only include bundles whose policy expiry is at or after this unix timestamp (ms).
parameters.name: policy_expires_after_ms

parameters.description: Filter to bundles whose attestation refresh deadline is at or before this unix timestamp (ms).
parameters.name: refresh_before_ms

parameters.description: Filter to bundles whose attestation refresh deadline is at or after this unix timestamp (ms).
parameters.name: refresh_after_ms

parameters.description: Match bundles whose attestation verdict id (hex) equals the provided value (case-insensitive).
parameters.name: verdict_id_hex

parameters.description: Match bundles whose attestation nonce (hex) equals the provided value (case-insensitive).
parameters.name: attestation_nonce_hex

parameters.description: Restrict settled bundles to a specific Android attestation policy (use `play_integrity` or `hms_safety_detect`).
parameters.name: platform_policy

parameters.description: When true, only bundles that already have attestation verdict metadata are returned.
parameters.name: require_verdict

parameters.description: When true, only bundles missing attestation verdict metadata are returned.
parameters.name: only_missing_verdict

post.description: Supports the Norito `QueryEnvelope` body to paginate and filter bundle records, enabling regulator views or PSP dashboards.
post.summary: Query offline transfer bundles via JSON envelope.

get.description: Returns the active repo agreements recorded on-chain with optional pagination, filtering, and account address formatting.

parameters.description: Optional maximum number of entries to return.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Zero-based pagination offset (default 0).
parameters.name: offset

parameters.description: Optional comma-separated sort expression (e.g., `id:asc,maturity_timestamp_ms:desc`).
parameters.name: sort

parameters.description: JSON-encoded FilterExpr limiting results (fields: id, initiator, counterparty, custodian).
parameters.name: filter

parameters.description: Preferred address format (`ih58` or `compressed`).
parameters.name: address_format

post.description: Structured query endpoint accepting a JSON envelope with pagination, sort, filter, and address_format fields.
post.summary: Query repo agreements with JSON envelope

get.description: Returns the best-effort network time with offset/confidence relative to UTC.
get.summary: Fetch the current network time snapshot.

get.description: Provides peer sampling metadata, RTT histogram buckets, and running totals gathered by the network time service.
